parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The uuidV4 identifier of the tester group.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum number of potential testers that this route will return for a page.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Specifies which page should be returned from the whole result set in a paginated scenario.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Searches for potential testers based on email or username, using a case-insensitive starts with search.
